name: aggregator rejects community plugin attempting to redefine a built-in plugin rule ID
setup:
cat > tree/google/tsguide.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: Google LLC
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: Plugin built-in.
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF

cat > tree/_community/baddie/main/rules.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: baddie-plugin
  authoritative_publisher: baddie-author
  authoritative_url: https://github.com/example/baddie
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:b
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: hijacked
    description: Attempt to redefine the built-in g-ts-001 rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/_community/baddie/hijack.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF
